points.text: Live Map Editing: You can now pan, zoom, and rotate in real time with MapLibre, so the map updates instantly as you work.
PDF Export: Posters can now be exported as PDF for cleaner and higher-quality printing.
Theme Customization: Every selected theme can now be customized with broader color control and your own color values.
PWA and Mobile Experience: Installation flow and mobile behavior are smoother, with better handling for map interaction.
Live Map Editing: The map is now fully interactive with MapLibre, so you can pan, zoom, and rotate instantly without pressing a generate button.
No More Generate Step: The old generate-map flow has been removed because updates now render live as you edit.
Safer Map Movement: A new Edit Map button helps prevent accidental map movement while adjusting other poster settings.
Better Mobile Handling: Rotation behavior on mobile is now controlled to avoid accidental twists while still keeping full map control available.
Precise Navigation Controls: You can move the map with mouse, keyboard, or touch and quickly recenter to your starting location at any time.
Smarter Location Labels: Place names now update live with zoom level, transitioning from city to country and continent context automatically.
Layer Visibility Panel: A new collapsible panel lets you toggle water, parks, and buildings, with buildings off by default until close zoom levels.
PDF Export: You can now export posters as PDF for sharper print quality and cleaner print workflows.
Map-Only Posters: Text can now be hidden so you can export a pure map design when needed.
Distance Freedom: Distance selection is no longer capped at 50,000 meters, enabling much larger compositions.
Theme Customization: After selecting a theme, you can now customize nearly every color using presets or your own values.
New Brand Identity: The app now includes a new logo for a cleaner and more recognizable visual identity.
Help Us Grow Section: A new section makes it easier to find social channels and support the project directly.
PWA Experience: Installation behavior and standalone launch support have been improved across devices for a smoother app-like experience.
Start From Your Location: With permission enabled, the app can now initialize the map from your current location.
SEO and Metadata: Search metadata has been refined to improve clarity and discoverability in search engines.
Architecture Upgrade: For the builders and nerds among you, the codebase was migrated from JavaScript to TypeScript and reorganized around feature-first hexagonal architecture.
Contributor Experience: The repository now includes clearer contributor guidance plus an agent-focused development guide.
Roadmap Preview: Next up are simplified theme controls, SVG export, expert map-detail mode, richer typography controls with online or uploaded fonts, and locally saved custom themes.
